title: Add Tinder-style profile header cards for each economist

requirements.text: Add a Tinder-style profile card header to each economist's StatementSlide and EconomistRevealCard. Each card header should display the economist's name in large bold typography, a stylized avatar/portrait placeholder with a gradient backdrop, age or era label (e.g. '1883–1946'), and location/school of thought tag — all styled in the classic Tinder card layout (full-bleed image area at top, overlaid name/info at bottom-left in white text on a dark gradient).

quotes: make the tinder head for each so it's for design purposes

acceptanceCriteria: Each economist entry (in StatementSlide and EconomistRevealCard) displays a Tinder-style profile card header with name, era/dates, and school-of-thought tag.
The card header uses a full-bleed gradient or colored background at the top with white overlaid text at the bottom-left, matching Tinder's visual layout.
The design is clearly labeled as 'for design purposes' or uses a clear placeholder treatment so it's understood as a UI mockup.
The overall styling remains consistent with the existing dark/gold Economic Tinder design system.
A shareable deployed link is produced after deployment.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep all changes consistent with the existing OKLCH dark-theme and gold accent design system defined in frontend/src/index.css and tailwind.config.js.
Do not alter backend/main.mo — this app is frontend-only.
nonGoals: Sourcing or embedding real economist portrait photographs.
Adding new swipe mechanics or slide logic.

required: Stylized illustrated portrait of Adam Smith in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-adam-smith.dim_400x500.png)
Stylized illustrated portrait of John Maynard Keynes in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-keynes.dim_400x500.png)
Stylized illustrated portrait of Milton Friedman in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-friedman.dim_400x500.png)
Stylized illustrated portrait of Karl Marx in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-marx.dim_400x500.png)
Stylized illustrated portrait of Friedrich Hayek in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-hayek.dim_400x500.png)
Stylized illustrated portrait of Joseph Schumpeter in a warm sepia oval frame with subtle gold border (economist-schumpeter.dim_400x500.png)
